capabilities.business_problem: Stakeholders see release status in scattered updates.
capabilities.desired_outcome: Generate a digest with scope, trade-offs, gates, and rollout risks.

capabilities.business_problem: Special requests move across spreadsheets and CRM notes.
capabilities.desired_outcome: Capture special requests with acceptance criteria and owner routing.

capabilities.business_problem: Service cases near departure need faster routing and priority rules.
capabilities.desired_outcome: Prioritize cases by departure window, traveler impact, and product line.

capabilities.business_problem: Duplicate traveler records cause itinerary preference conflicts.
capabilities.desired_outcome: Clean preference history before quote or booking edits.

capabilities.business_problem: Late rooming updates create manual rework before departure.
capabilities.desired_outcome: Expose editable change reason and cut-off validation.

capabilities.business_problem: Agents receive release notes without role-based workflow examples.
capabilities.desired_outcome: Publish role-based training and readiness checks.

capabilities.business_problem: Destination availability changes require manual catalog checks.
capabilities.desired_outcome: Add rule evidence and approval state before catalog publishing.

capabilities.business_problem: Enhancement requests arrive without consistent value or readiness signals.
capabilities.desired_outcome: Score requests by value, dependency, rollout complexity, and evidence.

capabilities.business_problem: Preference migration rules need business acceptance before deployment.
capabilities.desired_outcome: Map migration exceptions to user stories and sign-off evidence.

capabilities.business_problem: Solution layers are packaged manually and rollback evidence is inconsistent.
capabilities.desired_outcome: Standardize solution package gates with rollback notes.

capabilities.business_problem: Schedule changes arrive in several formats and are hard to prioritize.
capabilities.desired_outcome: Normalize supplier alerts into a ranked exception queue.

capabilities.business_problem: Release incidents lack product capability linkage.
capabilities.desired_outcome: Connect incident severity to release capability and acceptance decision.

capabilities.business_problem: Final payment reminder work is manually reconciled across systems.
capabilities.desired_outcome: Trigger reminder states from balance and due date rules.

capabilities.business_problem: Post-trip feedback does not consistently create backlog items.
capabilities.desired_outcome: Classify feedback themes and attach them to backlog refinement.

capabilities.business_problem: Cabin inventory exceptions require escalation before a traveler can book.
capabilities.desired_outcome: Route exceptions with evidence and approval status.

capabilities.business_problem: Quote follow-ups move across email and CRM tasks without a clear owner.
capabilities.desired_outcome: Create a single handoff state and follow-up SLA.

capabilities.business_problem: Travelers miss required documents when products span multiple countries.
capabilities.desired_outcome: Show product-specific document checklist and reminder state.

capabilities.business_problem: Amendment workflow rollback criteria are not documented per release.
capabilities.desired_outcome: Define rollback triggers, data checkpoints, and owner approval.
